#bepfo.b_hide { display: none !important; } #bepfo.darkMode { background-color: rgb(17, 16, 15) !important; color: rgb(= 237, 235, 233) !important; } #bepfo #bepfm { max-width: 320px; overflow: hidden; box-sizing: border-box;= border-radius: 4px; } .rwspotlight { padding-right: 376px; } @media only screen and (max-width: 1307px) { .rwspotlight { padding-right: 0px; } } .popup { transform: scale(0); transform-origin: center top; animation-name:= autoOpenPopup; animation-duration: 300ms; animation-delay: 200ms; animatio= n-timing-function: linear; animation-fill-mode: forwards; } @keyframes autoOpenPopup {=20 0% { transform: scale(0); } 30% { transform: scale(0.3); } 50% { transform: scale(0.5); } 80% { transform: scale(0.8); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } } 0.29= , 0.67) 0s infinite normal none running spin360Deg; } #rewardsLoadingAnimation.extraLarge { width: 100px; height: 100px; } #rewardsLoadingAnimation.large { width: 80px; height: 80px; } #rewardsLoadingAnimation.medium { width: 60px; height: 60px; } #rewardsLoadingAnimation.small { width: 40px; height: 40px; } #rewardsLoadingAnimation.extraSmall { width: 20px; height: 20px; } center; } #fbdialog_thumb_container > img { max-height: 280px; max-width: 280px; } #fbdialog_errormessage { text-align: center; color: rgb(204, 0, 0); margin-= top: 20px; } .b_dark #fbdialog_errormessage { color: rgb(255, 102, 102); } .contents { font-size: 13px; color: rgb(102, 102, 102); } .flagIcon { float: left; width: 20px; height: 20px; } .fbdialog .title { font-size: 16px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); padding-top: 3px; = } .message { padding: 15px 0px 20px; } .buttonLink { background: rgb(245, 245, 245); border: 1px solid rgb(221, 22= 1, 221); color: rgb(102, 102, 102); cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; line-= height: 15px; font-weight: bold; padding: 0px 16px; border-radius: 2px; mar= gin-left: 10px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; display: inline-= block; height: 32px; zoom: 1; } .b_dark .buttonLink { background: rgb(249, 249, 249); } .buttonLink:hover { background-color: rgb(249, 249, 249); text-decoration: = none; color: rgb(17, 17, 17); border: 1px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); } .b_dark .buttonLink:hover { background-color: rgb(245, 245, 245); } #checkbox_region { margin-top: 22px; column-count: 2; } #checkbox_region input { position: absolute; width: 16px; height: 16px; opa= city: 0; cursor: pointer; left: 0px; top: 0px; margin: 1px; } #checkbox_region label { display: inline; } #fbdialog #checkbox_region label.cb_c { display: inline-block; position: re= lative; margin: auto; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; line-height: 16px; = height: 18px; clear: both; padding-bottom: 3px; } .b_dark #fbdialog #checkbox_region label.cb_c .cb_t { color: rgb(210, 208, = 206); } #checkbox_region .cb_c .cb_w { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; hei= ght: 16px; width: 16px; background-color: transparent; border-radius: 2px; = border: 1px solid rgb(145, 145, 145); } #checkbox_region .cb_c .cb_w:hover { } #checkbox_region .cb_c input:checked ~ .cb_w { background-color: rgb(0, 128= , 157); border-radius: 2px; transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1); opacity: 1; b= order: 0px; } #checkbox_region .cb_c .cb_t { position: relative; margin-left: 20px; font-= size: 11px; height: 16px; display: inline-block; line-height: 16px; padding= -bottom: 0px; } #checkbox_region .cb_c input:focus ~ .cb_w, #checkbox_region .cb_c input:fo= cus ~ .cb_t { border: 1px dashed rgb(136, 136, 136); } .cb_c .cb_w::after { position: absolute; content: ""; } .cb_c input:checked ~ .cb_w::after { transform: rotate(45deg) scale(1); opa= city: 1; left: 4px; width: 6px; height: 12px; border-style: solid; border-c= olor: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-image: initial; border-width: 0px 2px 2px = 0px; background-color: transparent; border-radius: 0px; } #checkbox_region > div { text-align: left; } #fbdialog_buttons { margin-top: 17px; text-align: center; white-space: nowr= ap; } #fbdialog { position: fixed; top: 9%; z-index: 10001; display: none; backgr= ound-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgb(145, 145, 145); outli= ne: 0px; } .b_dark #fbdialog { background-color: rgb(59, 58, 57); } #fbdialog > .accDialog { display: block; position: relative; } .accDlgSf { opacity: 0; width: 0px; height: 0px; overflow: hidden; position= : absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; } #fbthankyou_button { text-align: center; } #adult_button_submit, #adult_button_cancel { width: 40%; } #fbdialogcl { cursor: pointer; background: url("/rp/qYcgES8Jht5urvMeEO9Ms8r= pNXE.png") -127px -17px no-repeat; float: right; height: 9px; width: 9px; t= op: 10px; right: 10px; position: relative; } .b_dark #fbdialogcl { background: url("/rp/qYcgES8Jht5urvMeEO9Ms8rpNXE.png") = -107px -17px no-repeat; } @media (min-width: 421px) { #fbdialog { left: 33%; } .contents { margin: 0px 20px; } .flagIcon { margin-left: 20px; } } @media (max-width: 420px) { #fbdialog { left: 3%; } .contents { margin: 0px 10px; } .flagIcon { margin-left: 10px; margin-right: 10px; } } @media only screen and (max-height: 480px) { #fbdialog { top: 3%; line-height: 0.8em; } .flagIcon { width: 8px; height: 8px; } .message { padding: 3px 0px 4px; } #fbdialog_thumb_container > img { max-height: 140px; max-width: 140px; } .fbdialog .title { font-size: 8px; padding-top: 1px; } #fbdialog .contents { font-size: 6px; } #adult_button_submit, #adult_button_cancel { width: 30%; } #fbdialog .buttonLink { font-size: 6px; padding: 2px; margin-left: 3px; } relative; bottom: 3px; } #checkbox_region > div { padding: 3px 0px; } #fbdialogcl { top: 5px; right: 5px; } } @media only screen and (max-height: 250px) { #fbdialog_thumb_container > img { max-height: #miniheader_data { position: relative; height: 49px; margin: -5px 0px 0px; = overflow: hidden; } #miniheader_data .sug { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inli= ne-block; border-left: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); padding: 0px 5px 0px 7= px; margin: 5px 0px 20px; height: 35px; vertical-align: middle; } #miniheader .col a strong { color: rgb(0, 27, 160); } #miniheader_data .sug:first-child { border-left-style: none; } #miniheader #sb_form_q, #miniheader #sa_ghostbox { display: inline-block; w= idth: 200px; transition: width 0.5s; text-overflow: ellipsis; } #miniheader #sa_ghostbox { border: 0px; } #miniheader #sb_form { width: auto; } .blue2#miniheader #sb_form_q { border-right: 1px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); = margin: 3px 9px 3px 12px; border-radius: 0px; } #miniheader_searchbox #sb_form_q { width= : 465px; } #miniheader_searchbox { min-width: 273px; } #miniheader_searchbox #sbi_p { display: none; } #miniheader .relatedGroup { display: none; opacity: 0; position: absolute; = top: 2px; } #miniheader_searchbox { width: 1px; white-space: nowrap; } #miniheader td { padding: 14px 0px 0px; } #miniheader .itm { color: rgb(0, 27, 160); display: inline-block; middle; display= : inline-block; } #miniheader .itm > img { width: 35px; height: 35px; } #miniheader .itm > div { vertical-align: middle; display: inline-block; } #miniheader_switch { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); width: 25px; opa= city: 0.9; vertical-align: middle; } #miniheader_switch:hover, #miniheader_switch.touch { background-color: rgb(= 239, 239, 239); } border-color: rgb(51, 51, 51) rgb(51, 51, = 51) rgb(255, 255, 255); } .it img { padding-left: 5px; } #miniheader .itm:hover { background-color: rgb(239, 239, 239); } #miniheader .underline .itm:hover #svflytc::after { content: ""; height: calc(100% + 8px); width: 100%; inset= : -8px 0px 0px; position: absolute; z-index: -1; } #svflytc .scflyt.b_scactive { border-radius: 8px; min-width: 100px; none; } .toggle_ctrl { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; margin-left: = 5px; width: 38px; height: 16px; overflow: hidden; } .toggle_img { position: relative; top: 0px; left: 0px; } .toggle_label { display: inline-block; width: 173px; user-select: none; } .no_outline .toggle_item { outline: 0px; } .toggle_item { cursor: pointer; } .toggle_img svg { width: 36px; height: 16px; } .toggle_img .bg { fill: rgb(145, 145, 145); display: block; } .toggle_img .bgOverlay { fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke: rgb(145, 145, 14= 5); display: none; } .toggle_img.overlay .bg { display: none; } .toggle_img.overlay .bgOverlay { display: block; } .toggle_img .indicator { transform: translateX(-20px); transition: 0.15s cu= bic-bezier(0.3, 0.5, 0.1, 1); } .toggle_img.toggle_on .indicator { inline-block; } .mic_cont.partner { margin: 0px 0px 5px 18px; } #b_header .b_scopebar { z-index: 3; } #b_header .b_scopebar > ul.b_scope_scroll { overflow-x: scroll; white-space= : nowrap; scrollbar-width: none; padding-left: var(--lgutter); margin-left:= -160px; } #b_header .b_scopebar > ul.b_scope_scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { display: non= e; } .b_scopebar .b_active::after { display: none; } .b_scopebar .b_active a { color: rgb(23, 74, 228); background: rgb(226, 233= , 255); border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 700; } .b_scopebar li { margin: 0px 8px; } .b_scopebar li:first-child { margin: 0px 8px 0px 12px; } .b_scopebar li:hover:not(.b_active) { border-bottom: 0px; } .b_scopebar li a { border-radius: 20px; padding: 0px 12px; } .b_scopebar > ul > li:hover:not(.b_active):not(#b_primary_nav_scope):not(#b= -scopeListItem-menu) a { background: rgb(236, 236, 236); } span.scp_shop_home, span.scp_images_home { vertical-align: middle; display:= inline-block; margin-right: 6px; margin-top: -2px; } .scp_shop_home .b_pri_nav_svg, .scp_images_home svg { display: flex; } .b_dark #b_header .b_scopebar .b_active a { background: rgb(162, 183, 244);= .share-preview-container .share-title span { max-width: 300px; line-height:= 22px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; font= -size: 14px; } .actionmenudark.actionmenularge .share-preview-container { box-shadow: none= ; } .actionmenudark.actionmenularge .share-preview-container .share-preview-mod= al { background: linear-gradient(to top, rgb(27, 26, 25), transparent); } .actionmenudark.actionmenularge .share-preview-container .share-provider { = background-color: rgb(27, 26, 25); } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent .actionlist .actionitem.shareactionitem= .share-preview-content { height: 165px; overflow: auto; user-select: none;= scrollbar-width: thin; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent .actionlist .actionitem.shareactionitem= .share-preview-content cib-history-conversation { display: flex; min-heigh= t: 100%; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent .actionlist .actionitem.shareactionitem= .sharemedia { display: grid; position: relative; justify-content: space-be= tween; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, 96px); margin-top: 6px; mar= gin-bottom: 0px; padding: 6px 0px 0px; } .actionmenumobile.actionmenularge .actionmenucontent .actionlist .actionite= m.shareactionitem .sharemedia { display: block; max-width: 90vw; overflow-x= : auto; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent .actionlist .actionitem.shareactionitem= .sharemedia .sharemedia_item { height: 122px; margin: 0px; position: relat= ive; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent .actionlist .actionitem.shareactionitem= .sharemedia a { padding: 12px 24px 70px; border-radius: 4px; margin: 0px; = } .actionmenumobile.actionmenularge .actionmenucontent .actionlist .actionite= m.shareactionitem .sharemedia a { padding: 12px 18px 42px; } .actionmenudark.actionmenularge .actionmenucontent .actionlist .actionitem.= shareactionitem .sharemedia a:hover, .actionmenudark.actionmenularge .actio= nmenucontent .actionlist .actionitem.shareactionitem .sharemedia a:focus { = background-color: rgb(59, 58, 57); } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent .actionlist .actionitem.shareactionitem= .sharemedia a .actIconSvg svg.b_hide { display: none; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent .actionlist .actionitem.shareactionitem= .sharemedia a .actIconSvg svg { height: 48px; width: 48px; transform: scal= e(0.8333); border-radius: 50%; fill: none !important; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent .actionlist .actionitem.shareactionitem= .sharemedia a .actIconImg { transform: scale(0.8333); } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent .actionlist .actionitem.shareactionitem= .sharemedia .shareMediumText { text-align: center; line-height: 1; white-s= pace: normal; top: 72px; left: 0px; right: 0px; position: absolute; color: = rgb(68, 68, 68); } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent .actionlist .actionitemdivider { displa= y: none; } @media screen and (forced-colors: active) and (prefers-color-scheme: dark) = { .actionitem.shareactionitem svg { fill: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; } } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent.screenshot .sreenshot-container { posit= ion: relative; height: 200px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid rgb(238= , 238, 238); margin-top: 12px; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent.screenshot .sreenshot-container.loading= .image-container { animation: 3s linear 0s infinite normal none running br= eathe; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent.screenshot .sreenshot-container .image-= container { position: relative; overflow: hidden; height: 100%; width: 100%= ; border-radius: 6px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: flex; justif= y-content: center; align-items: center; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent.screenshot .sreenshot-container .image-= container img { max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; z-index: 1; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent.screenshot .sreenshot-container .backgr= ound-image { position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-repeat: no-repeat; = background-size: cover; filter: blur(37.5px); } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent.screenshot .sreenshot-container .image-= screenshot { flex: 0 0 auto; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent.screenshot .sreenshot-container .image-= screenshot.b-hidden { display: none; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent.screenshot .sreenshot-container .title = { position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent.screenshot .sreenshot-container::after = { content: ""; display: inline-block; width: calc(100% - 20px); height: 4px= ; filter: blur(14px); background: linear-gradient(251.21deg, rgba(29, 88, 1= 95, 0.4) 0.69%, rgba(0, 91, 255, 0.4) 0.7%, rgba(138, 92, 235, 0.4) 26.84%,= rgba(46, 155, 255, 0.4) 65.14%, rgba(46, 100, 206, 0.4) 77.54%); position:= absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 10px; z-index: -1; } .actionmenularge .actionmenucontent.screenshot .actionlist .actionitem.shar= eactionitem .sharemedia { margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 0px; } @keyframes breathe {=20 0% { background: rgb(204, 204, 204); } 50% { background: rgba(204, 204, 204, 0.5); } 100% { background: rgb(204, 204, 204); } } @media screen and (max-height: 690px) { .actionmenumobile.actionmenularge .actionmenucontent.screenshot .sreensho= t-container { display: none; } } .actionmenudark.actionmenularge .actionmenucontent.screenshot .sreenshot-co= ntainer { border: 1px solid rgb(72, 70, 68); } .actionmenudark.actionmenularge .actionmenucontent.screenshot .sreenshot-co= ntainer .image-container { background: rgb(0, 0, 0); } .shareBar { background-color: rgb(136, 136, 136); margin: 0px; padding: 0px= ; } :host { --share-spinner-fore: #050f2e; --share-spinner-back: #d1dbfa; } .sh-dark { --share-spinner-fore: #fff; --share-spinner-back: rgba(255,255,2= 55,.4); } .share-content-container .share-loading-spinner { position: absolute; inset= : 0px; } .share-content-container > :last-child { display: flex; justify-content: ce= nter; align-items: center; gap: 10px; z-index: 1002; } .content-disabled { pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.1; } .display-none { display: none !important; } .share-spinner { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-top-color: ; border-top-= style: ; border-top-width: ; border-right-color: ; border-right-style: ; bo= rder-right-width: ; border-bottom-style: ; border-bottom-width: ; border-le= ft-color: ; border-left-style: ; border-left-width: ; border-image-source: = ; border-image-slice: ; border-image-width: ; border-image-outset: ; border= -image-repeat: ; border-bottom-color: var(--share-spinner-fore); border-rad= ius: 50%; display: inline-block; box-sizing: border-box; animation: 1s line= ar 0s infinite normal none running share-spinner-rotation; } @keyframes share-spinner-rotation {=20 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(360deg); } } ------MultipartBoundary--lp8QTERhrl9p5Hcgd28Oo8urTVYVSm2t4Jd3CSKzWw---- Content-Type: content: ""= ; transform: translateX(-50%) rotate(45deg); bottom: 19px; z-index: 4; } .disableTooltip [data-tooltip]:hover::before, .disableTooltip [data-tooltip= ]:hover::after { display: none; }
